title: SimoneFromThePlantLab/scRNAseq-hypoxia-SAM-RAM: Initial release of scRNAseq-hypoxia-SAM-RAM analysis scripts
author: SimoneFromThePlantLab
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This release includes all R and Python scripts used to perform the analyses presented in the manuscript
"Inferring hypoxia-responsive regulators of cell fate in plant meristems through single-cell transcriptomics." 
 The repository contains: 
 
 Preprocessing and clustering scripts for SAM and RAM datasets 
 Pseudotime and RNA velocity analysis workflows 
 Marker selection and overlap analysis 
 Visualization scripts (heatmaps, dotplots)
